commands.cmd: D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\.venv\Scripts\python.exe D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\scripts\ctcp_orchestrate.py new-run --goal Generate a small full-stack local task board application. It must not be an agent manifest, agent scaffold, or dry-run-only project. It must include a static frontend, local HTTP API, generated tests, README, and SQLite persistence. Required endpoints: GET /, GET /static/app.js, GET /static/styles.css, GET /api/tasks, POST /api/tasks, PATCH /api/tasks/{id}, DELETE /api/tasks/{id}. Required frontend assets: static/index.html, static/app.js, static/styles.css. Persistence requirement: SQLite database file with task rows. Generate the concrete project files, tests, README, runnable local HTTP server, and delivery package. --run-id full-stack-local_task_board_app-1779092456

commands.cmd: D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\.venv\Scripts\python.exe D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\scripts\ctcp_orchestrate.py new-run --goal Generate a more complex full-stack local Kanban board application. It must not be an agent manifest, agent scaffold, or dry-run-only project. It must include a static frontend, local HTTP API, generated tests, README, multiple board columns, cards CRUD, move-card behavior, and SQLite persistence. Required endpoints: GET /, GET /static/app.js, GET /static/styles.css, POST /boards, GET /boards, POST /boards/{board_id}/cards, GET /boards/{board_id}/cards, PATCH /cards/{card_id}/move, PATCH /cards/{card_id}, DELETE /cards/{card_id}. Required frontend assets: static/index.html, static/app.js, static/styles.css. Persistence requirement: SQLite database file with boards and cards tables. Generate the concrete project files, tests, README, runnable local HTTP server, and delivery package. --run-id full-stack-local_kanban_board_app-1779092679
